message:
Unify three grow-only buffer patterns into single ensureBuf helper

Deduplicate ensureInputBuffer, ensureFeedBuffer, and writeKeyToMemory
buffer management into a shared ensureBuf(buf, needed, minCap) helper.
All three followed the identical pattern: check cap, free old, double
until fits, alloc new. Now use three {ptr, cap} objects with one helper.
